testcase.name: test_create_duplicate_room_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Should receive error for duplicate room assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_bid_whist_grand_master.py:161: in test_create_duplicate_room_fails assert error_received, "Should receive error for duplicate room" E AssertionError: Should receive error for duplicate room E assert False

testcase.name: test_join_game

failure.message: AssertionError: Player should join successfully assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_bid_whist_grand_master.py:211: in test_join_game assert player_joined, "Player should join successfully" E AssertionError: Player should join successfully E assert False

testcase.name: test_join_nonexistent_room_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Should receive error for nonexistent room assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_bid_whist_grand_master.py:244: in test_join_nonexistent_room_fails assert error_received, "Should receive error for nonexistent room" E AssertionError: Should receive error for nonexistent room E assert False

testcase.name: test_four_player_game_start

failure.message: AssertionError: Hand should start with 4 players assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_bid_whist_grand_master.py:311: in test_four_player_game_start assert hand_started, "Hand should start with 4 players" E AssertionError: Hand should start with 4 players E assert False
